idea-plugin.name: Spring Boot Endpoint Explorer
idea-plugin.description:
Spring Boot API Endpoint Explorer

Scans Spring Boot projects and displays all REST API endpoints in a dedicated tool window.

Features:

  • ✅ Scans @RestController / @Controller annotated classes
  • ✅ Groups endpoints by controller with base path
  • ✅ Shows HTTP method badges (GET=🟢, POST=🔵, PUT=🟠, DELETE=🔴, PATCH=🟣)
  • ✅ Displays request parameters, path variables, request body, and return types
  • ✅ Double-click to navigate directly to the endpoint source code
  • ✅ Auto-detects @RequestMapping on both class and method level
  • ✅ Real-time refresh button
idea-plugin.change-notes:
v1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Endpoint scanning and display
  • Source code navigation
